title: Group words by first letter
prompt:
Write group_by_first(words) that returns a dict mapping each lowercase first letter
to the list of words (in input order) starting with that letter, case-insensitive.
Skip empty strings.

Example:
  group_by_first(["apple", "Avocado", "banana"]) -> {"a": ["apple", "Avocado"], "b": ["banana"]}
